text: The livestream bundle looked cheap but I only bought because the free shipping voucher stacked at checkout.
Shopee delivery estimate said tomorrow then changed after I paid. Voucher does not fix wasting my time.
I save Shopee finds from reels, then compare reviews because some stores use the same product images.
Seller replied fast and packed well. I paid a little more than the cheapest listing because reviews felt real.
If the 6.6 codes are not better than Lazada I am not checking out. Need free shipping plus coins.
For electronics I avoid marketplace sellers unless returns are obvious. Low price is not enough when warranty is unclear.
Creator showing the item live helps, but I still ask whether the seller is official before buying.
I reorder household stuff on Shopee when delivery is predictable. I do not have time to chase refunds.
